ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tile_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tile pattern */,
  "pattern_description" TEXT /* Description of the tile pattern (e.g., 2:2 Herringbone) */,
  "tile_length" TEXT /* Length of the tile in inches */,
  "tile_width" TEXT /* Width of the tile in inches */,
  "length_width_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of tile length to width */,
  "num_tiles_direction_1" INTEGER /* Number of tiles in the first direction of the pattern */,
  "num_tiles_direction_2" INTEGER /* Number of tiles in the second direction of the pattern */,
  "pattern_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image representing the tile pattern */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material the tile is made of (e.g., ceramic, porcelain) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the tile */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Finish type (e.g., matte, glossy) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the tile manufacturer */,
  "cost_per_tile" REAL /* Cost of each tile */,
  "pattern_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity level of the pattern (e.g., simple, moderate, complex) */,
  "installation_instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for installing the pattern */,
  "maintenance_requirements" TEXT /* Maintenance requirements for the pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "project_location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "client_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the client */,
  "project_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_patterns" (
  "project_pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-pattern relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tile pattern */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the project where the pattern is used */,
  "total_tiles_required" INTEGER /* Total number of tiles required for the area */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the pattern was installed */,
  "installation_team" TEXT /* Team or personnel who installed the pattern */,
  "inspector" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who verified the installation */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the installation was inspected */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_patterns_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_patterns_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES tile_patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, project manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the company */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed entity (e.g., project_id, pattern_id) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the accessed entity (e.g., project, pattern) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accessed_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_entity_id") REFERENCES tile_patterns ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accessed_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_entity_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tile pattern */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of tiles in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Quantity at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the inventory */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES tile_patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pattern_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tile pattern */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the pattern */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the pattern was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded pattern image */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "upload_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_uploads_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES tile_patterns ("pattern_id")
)
